articles.title: Build it and they will come — but will they have a good place to buy their groceries?
articles.description:
Boston faces the livability conundrum of building up neighborhoods.

The post Build it and they will come — but will they have a good place to buy their groceries? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston's new developments raise concerns about grocery accessibility for residents.
Seaport's rapid growth lacks sufficient grocery stores for its 15,000 residents.
Local leaders emphasize the need for infrastructure to support community needs.
